---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Backend (API, brain components, agents)
- [ ] Frontend (UI, components, pages)
- [ ] CLI (`forge` commands)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, database, migrations)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the request.
